assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and an email address.
No Stream organization, app, API key, product selection, or SDK integration exists yet.

developer_goal: Create a Stream account and reach the earliest official first-success outcome for a Stream product.

first_success.outcome: Unresolved: Chat, Video & Audio, Activity Feeds, Moderation, and Vision Agents each define a different observable first success.
first_success.observable_signal: Product-specific signals such as a ready chat WebSocket, joined call participants, or a created feed activity cannot be unified without choosing one product.

route_selection.surface: Stream Dashboard and product docs after shared account creation
route_selection.rule: Lexicographic shortest complete route only after one product and implementation surface is fixed; equal consequential product outcomes stay unresolved.

candidates.name: Chat Messaging client quickstart
candidates.reason: Official Chat docs define a chat-ready WebSocket and rendered ready state that does not match Video or Feeds terminals.

candidates.name: Video & Audio client quickstart
candidates.reason: Video quickstarts terminate on a joined call with rendered participants, a different outcome from Chat or Feeds.

candidates.name: Activity Feeds quickstart
candidates.reason: Feeds docs terminate on creating a feed and adding an activity, not a chat or call session.

candidates.name: Dashboard versus Stream CLI / agent scaffolding
candidates.reason: The official getting-started guide presents Dashboard setup and CLI/agent scaffolding as alternate paths after the same account.

required_path.action: Create a Stream account with email and password or an identity provider.

required_fields.label: Password
required_fields.notes: Google and GitHub signup are also documented; exact live form controls were not independently observed in this audit.

required_path.observable_result: Stream continues onboarding and asks which main product to use.

required_path.action: Select the main Stream product for the application during signup onboarding.

required_fields.label: Main product
required_fields.notes: Choosing Chat, Feeds, Video, Moderation, or Vision Agents changes the later path and first-success signal.

required_path.observable_result: The developer reaches the Stream Dashboard for the selected product context.

required_path.action: Complete the unresolved product-specific credential and first-success route.
required_path.observable_result: Depends on the unresolved product route.

prerequisites.description: A Stream account is shared across Chat, Feeds, Video, Moderation, and Vision Agents.

platform_outcomes.description: Stream creates an organization and default app credentials after account creation.

excluded.item: Reading product documentation before choosing a route
excluded.reason: Documentation reading is not a counted developer action.

excluded.item: Post-success channel lists, reactions, recording, or production hardening
excluded.reason: These occur after each product's first documented success signal.

sources.title: Chat Messaging Docs
evidence_supported: Chat product entry and client connection success framing

sources.title: Video & Audio Docs
evidence_supported: Video product entry and call-oriented success framing

sources.title: Activity Feeds Docs
evidence_supported: Feeds product entry and activity-creation success framing

sources.title: Guide to Getting Started with Stream
How to Register for Stream Chat
evidence_supported: Default app and API key or secret creation after registration

uncertainties.question: Which Stream product and implementation route defines the corpus-wide first mile?
uncertainties.impact: The first-success outcome, credentials, SDK steps, and action counts all change with the product choice.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A workshop-owner decision that fixes one product and one official quickstart, then a fresh-account walkthrough of that route.

uncertainties.question: What exact current signup fields, anti-abuse checks, and organization controls appear in the live Stream account flow?
uncertainties.impact: Account-step field counts cannot be verified from the blog-level signup description alone.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Dated screenshots or a read-only walkthrough of the current getstream.io account-creation UI.
